# backend/core/jwt_auth.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:52Z

## Purpose
JWT session token helper · Iter 30 · F1 simplified.

Per §47.6 + §61 · session token for cross-request auth.
HS256 with shared secret · short TTL by default · refresh endpoint.

Per §57.7: dev fallback secret · operator wires real KMS-backed key
when shipping prod.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import hashlib
- from `_` import hmac
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import time
- from `base64` import urlsafe_b64decode, urlsafe_b64encode

## Inputs
- Env vars: INSUR_JWT_SECRET, INSUR_JWT_TTL

## Process
### Functions
- `_b64encode(b)`: (no docstring)
- `_b64decode(s)`: (no docstring)
- `encode_jwt(payload, secret, ttl_seconds)`: Encode an HS256 JWT with iat + exp.
- `decode_jwt(token, secret)`: Decode + verify HS256 JWT. Raises ValueError on invalid/expired.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
